default_behavioral_patterns: Under deadline pressure, tends to optimize for immediate relief over long-term exploration.
Past job decisions weighted heavily on brand name when data on team fit was thin.

past_decisions.situation_summary: Two internship offers: a well-known tech company with a generic rotation program versus a smaller startup with direct mentorship.
past_decisions.outcome: Learned enterprise process but felt under-challenged; mentor time was sparse.
behavioral_patterns: Chose prestige over role clarity when stressed.

past_decisions.situation_summary: Deadline to confirm a return offer while still interviewing elsewhere.
past_decisions.chosen_option: Asked for a 5-day extension; used the time to finish one more interview round.
past_decisions.outcome: Secured a better fit; no bridge burned with the first employer.

past_decisions.situation_summary: Whether to drop a heavy course mid-semester after poor midterm.
past_decisions.chosen_option: Stayed in the course, increased office hours usage.
past_decisions.outcome: Recovered to a B; high stress but avoided transcript penalty.

past_decisions.situation_summary: Lease renewal vs. moving to a cheaper shared apartment farther from campus.
past_decisions.chosen_option: Renewed current lease for stability during recruiting season.
past_decisions.outcome: Higher rent but saved commute time during interviews.

past_decisions.situation_summary: Conflict with a project teammate; escalate to professor or resolve directly.
past_decisions.chosen_option: Scheduled a direct conversation with clear agenda before involving staff.
past_decisions.outcome: Resolved scope split; avoided formal escalation.
